reason: Codex runtime returned 'You've hit your usage limit' (reset ~09:28 PDT); the write-enabled review could not run. Fell back to a careful manual re-derivation: every load-bearing equation (v=alpha*eps-sigma*x_0 as dz/dphi; recovery x_0=alpha*z-sigma*v as exact inverse; eps=sigma*z+alpha*v; DDIM-in-v rotation z_s=cos(phi_s-phi_t)z+sin(phi_s-phi_t)v and the cos(delta)z-sin(delta)v delta form; SNR+1 weighting ||v-v_hat||^2=(1+alpha^2/sigma^2)||x-x_hat||^2=(1/sigma^2)||x-x_hat||^2; high/low-SNR limits v->eps, v->-x) was numerically verified, and the final code was confirmed byte-identical to the MLS-Bench edit.py and consistent with google-research/diffusion_distillation and diffusers get_velocity / v_prediction.
